title: Transient Ischemic Attack and Carotid Web
authors_text: H. Hu, X. Zhang, J. Zhao, Y. Li, Y. Zhao.
abstract: This study describes the association between carotid web—a thin, fibrous intimal shelf in the internal carotid artery—and transient ischemic attack, highlighting the vascular imaging features of this under-recognized cause of ischemic stroke in young patients.
